provisions.content: This Proclamation may be cited as the Establishment of Regions Proclamation.

With effect from the fifteenth day of October, 1963, Tanzania shall be divided into the Regions specified in the first column of the Schedule hereto, and the said Regions shall be known by the names therein assigned to them and each Region shall include and consist of the Districts set out opposite to the name of that Region in the second column of the said Schedule. Schedule Region Districts 1. The Arusha Region The Arusha District The Arumeru District The Babati District The Hanang District The Karatu District The Kiteto District The Mbulu District The Monduli District The Ngorongoro District The Simanjiro District 2. The Coast Region The Bagamoyo District The Kibaha District The Kisarawe District The Mafia District The Mkuranga District The Utete/Rufiji District 3. The Dar es Salaam Region The Ilala District The Kinondoni District The Temeke District 4. The Dodoma Region The Dodoma Urban District The Dodoma Rural District The Kondoa District The Kongwa District The Mpwapwa District 5. The Iringa Region The Iringa District The Ludewa District The Makete District The Mufindi District The Njombe District 6. The Kagera Region The Biharamulo District The Bukoba District The Karagwe District The Muleba District The Ngara District 7. The Kaskazini Pemba Region The Micheweni District The Wete District 8. The Kaskazini Unguja Region The Kaskazini ‘A’ District The Kaskazini ‘B’ District 9. The Kusini Pemba Region The Chakechake District The Mkoani District 10. The Kusini Unguja Region The Kusini District The Kati District 11. The Mjini Magharibi Region The Mjini District The Magharibi District 12. The Kigoma Region The Kasulu District The Kibondo District The Kigoma District 13. The Kilimanjaro Region The Hai DistrictThe Moshi District The Mwanga District The Rombo DistrictThe Same District 14. The Lindi Region The Kilwa DistrictThe Lindi District The Liwale District The Nachingwea District The Ruangwa District 15. The Mara Region The Bunda District The Musoma District The Serengeti District The Tarime District 16. The Mbeya Region The Chunya District The Ileje District The Kyela District The Mbarali District The Mbeya District The Mbozi District The Rungwe District 17. The Morogoro Region The Kilombero District The Kilosa District The Morogoro District The Ulanga District 18. The Mtwara Region The Masasi District The Mtwara District The Newala District The Tandahimba District 19. The Mwanza Region The Geita District The Kwimba District The Magu District The Misungwi District The Mwanza District The Sengerema District The Ukerewe District 20 The Rukwa Region The Mpanda District The Nkasi District The Sumbawanga District 21. The Ruvuma Region The Mbinga District The Songea District The Tunduru District 22. The Singida Region The Iramba District The Manyoni District The Singida District 23 The Shinyanga Region The Bariadi District The Bukombe District The Kahama District The Maswa District The Meatu District The Shinyanga District 24. The Tabora Region The Igunga District The Nzega District The Sikonge District The Tabora District The Urambo District 25.
